metadata.title: Auktivo - AI Assistant for Foreclosure Auctions
metadata.description: Analyze foreclosure auctions in minutes instead of hours. AI-powered risk analysis, chat assistant, and automatic notifications.

hero.title: Analyze foreclosure auctions intelligently
hero.subtitle: What used to take 2 hours of manual review, Auktivo does in minutes. AI reads the report, extracts risks, and answers your questions.

problem.title: Why 70% give up frustrated
problem.description: The official ZVG portal shows listings and reports - but as unreadable 60-100 page PDF and TIF files. Impossible to evaluate without expertise.
points: Reports: 60-100 pages of barely readable scans
Expensive pro tools only for large investors

solution.title: Auktivo solves this
solution.step1_desc: Daily import of all foreclosure listings from the ZVG portal. Filterable by zip code, property type, and market value.
solution.step2_desc: OCR reads the document. Our AI MAX extracts encumbrances, renovation needs, tenant issues, and land register charges.
solution.step3_desc: The AI chat assistant answers your follow-up questions directly - no lawyer, no building expert needed.

ai_analysis.title: AI Risk Analysis
ai_analysis.desc: Structured risk signals for encumbrances, renovation needs, tenancy issues, and land register charges.

ai_chat.title: AI Chat Assistant
ai_chat.desc: Ask follow-up questions about the report in natural language. AI responds based on the analyzed document.

alerts.title: Search Alerts
alerts.desc: Get notified immediately when new properties appear in your search area.

search.title: Advanced Search
search.desc: Search by zip code, radius, property type, market value, and risk level.

pro.name: Pro
features: AI chat assistant for follow-up questions

pro_features.ai_chat: AI chat assistant for follow-up questions

faq.cancel_desc: Yes. Cancel anytime yourself without contacting support. Your Pro access remains active until the end of the paid month.
faq.data_desc: You can export all your data at any time or fully delete your account (GDPR-compliant).

disclaimer.ai: AI Notice: This analysis was created automatically and serves as orientation only. It does not replace legal, tax, or technical expert advice. WAMOCON GmbH assumes no liability for the accuracy of AI outputs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: A foreclosure auction is a court-supervised process in which a debtor's real estate is sold to satisfy creditor claims. Courts coordinate the process and publish listings on zvg-portal.de.
faq.q2: How reliable are the AI analyses?
faq.a2: Our AI MAX analyzes reports with a conservative approach - better to have too many warnings than too few. The analyses serve as initial orientation but do not replace professional advice.
faq.a3: Auktivo reads all PDF and TIF reports linked on the ZVG portal via OCR and passes the text to our AI MAX.
faq.a4: Yes, completely self-service in your profile without contacting support. Your access remains active until the end of the paid month.
faq.a5: Yes. All data is stored on Supabase servers in the EU (Frankfurt). You can export your data at any time or delete your account.
